description: DAST triage over the running FSC portal. The FSC runtime checklist always injects an IDOR (HIGH) finding on the household REST endpoint, so verdict is FAIL in every case in this fixture — worth locking down as an invariant.

cases.name: no_sarif_still_finds_the_portal_checklist_issues
cases.labelled_by: Security reviewer — the runtime checklist runs even with no scanner output, and IDOR alone is enough to fail

cases.name: sarif_finding_is_folded_in_ahead_of_the_checklist
cases.labelled_by: Security reviewer — scanner-sourced findings are triaged first, then the FSC checklist is appended

findings.message: unescaped query param reflected in response
